summary: Completed testing of Arena Booking System third iteration features - Black header implementation across all pages, taller sport cards (h-72), and guest booking functionality without registration. All requested features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: JavaScript runtime error: UserMenu is not defined
integration_issues.details: Admin page shows JavaScript errors but functionality still works

passed_tests: Sport cards have correct height (h-72 instead of h-48)
Event details page header has black background
Login page header has black background
Register page header has black background
Sports page header has black background
Guest booking modal opens when clicking 'Foglalás' button
Guest booking form has all required fields: name, email, phone
Guest booking API works: POST /api/bookings/guest (no auth required)
Guest booking requires guest_name and guest_email (phone optional)
Guest booking form validation works for missing required fields
Guest booking submission successful with confirmation message
Guest booking modal closes after successful submission
All 27 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
SMTP email configuration working for guest bookings
Black header consistent across all tested pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript error in AdminLayout component - UserMenu is not defined. This causes runtime errors on admin pages but doesn't break functionality.
